response:
Certainly! Here's a professionally written version of your email in English, with PII removed and replaced with generic placeholders:

---

Subject: Confirmation of Compliance System Training

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your response to the invitation I sent you yesterday. We have confirmed that two sessions will be available for you to choose from. The training will take place on [Date] at 6:00 PM, 14:00, and 16:00. The session at 16:00 will be held in [Location], and the training will be conducted in English.

Please attend the session that best suits your schedule. We appreciate your attention to this important opportunity.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Organization]  

---

If you'd like to adjust the date, time, or location, please let me know!
